context: A live ballad performance is underway in a bright modern hall while the audience listens closely.

actions.description: Singer stands centered at the microphone as the band begins the ballad and the audience remains still.
Singer leans forward, gestures through the chorus, and shimmering fabric flickers under moving stage lights.
Singer sustains the final phrase while the digital backdrop blooms with color and the audience stays absorbed.
